content: If we map the linguistic concept of reflexion as both word meaning reflection/reflecting and the AI framework of iterative self-improvement together, we can hypothesize that second-language vocabulary learning can be enhanced by embedding a Self-Refine-style iterative feedback loop rooted in active learner reflexion. This approach would have learners not just memorize vocabulary but iteratively refine their own contextual use of new words based on self-generated feedback, turning passive memorization into an autonomous self-improving process.
